title: Spectral: legacy planks add-on
description: An add-on for Spectral that restores the old jungle and crimson plank colors.
body:
Add-on pack for [Spectral](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spectral).

With the release of 1.20 and two new wood types that were a bit too close to Spectral's crimson and jungle planks, the pink and yellow planks got a makeover.

This changes the crimson and jungle plank textures to their former pink and yellow glory!
